mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_scheduler_config ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_scheduler_config (id, name, description, cron_expression, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{cronExpression}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_scheduler_config SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
